basic_details.job_title: IIM Bodh Gaya Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Bodh Gaya
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Bodh Gaya (IIM Bodh Gaya) Non-Faculty Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of IIM Bodh Gaya. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Bodh Gaya Non-Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 for various posts including Estate cum Project Officer, Executive Engineer, Administrative Officer, Finance & Accounts Officer, Legal Officer, Office Assistant, Junior Assistant, Nursing Staff, and others.

age_limit.age_details: As per Central Government rules for SC/ST/NC-OBC/PWD/Ex-Servicemen
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per Central Government rules for SC/ST/NC-OBC/PWD/Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/ B.Tech Civil, Post Graduate, MBA, CA/M.Com, LLB, Master's in Psychology, Bachelor's Degree, BBA/BCA, Graduate in Nursing, Master's in Library Science, Master's in Commerce, Bachelor's Degree
qualification.details: Estate cum Project Officer: BE/B.Tech in Engineering (Civil) from a recognized University/Institute with 60% and consistently good academic record. Minimum 15 years of experience in handling of construction projects post-qualification preferably with Departments, Undertakings, and authorities under Government of India. Executive Engineer: B.E/B.Tech in Engineering (Civil) from a recognized University/Institute with 60% and consistently good academic record. Minimum of 10 years of experience post-qualification preferably from CPWD / State PWD or similar organized services / Semi-Govt. / PSU / Statutory or Autonomous organization / Universities / reputed Institute or organizations under Central / State Govt. Administrative Officer (Administration): Post-Graduate degree in any discipline (10+2+3+2) with at least second class (55% marks) OR Post-Graduate degree in Management (MBA) (10+2+3+2) from a reputed University / Institute. Post-qualification experience of at least 8 years in administration / academic / admission activities out of which 5 years in independently handling these functions preferably in a reputed Academic Institution/ University. Administrative Officer (Programs): Post-Graduate degree in any discipline (10+2+3+2) with minimum 55% marks OR Post-Graduate degree in Management (MBA) (10+2+3+2) from a reputed University / Institute with minimum 60% marks or its equivalent grade and consistently good academic record. Post-qualification experience of at least 8 years in administration / academic / admission activities out of which 5 years' experience should be in handling these activities independently, preferably in a reputed Academic Institution/ University. Administrative Officer (Purchase): Post-Graduate degree in any discipline (10+2+3+2) with at least second class (55% marks) from a recognised reputed University or Institute. Post-qualification experience of at least 8 years out of which 5 years in independently handling purchase and store functions in industry/ Govt./Public Sector undertaking. Finance & Accounts Officer: Chartered Accountant/ Cost Accountant OR M.Com. preferably with S.A.S or equivalent, with minimum 55% marks or its equivalent grade and consistently good academic record. Minimum 8 years of experience post-qualification as Accounts Executive in industry/Govt./Public Sector undertaking. Legal Officer: A professional Law Graduate with extensive experience in dealing with legal matters of any Govt. organization/Government undertaking etc., service laws, Labour Laws, Land Laws and Liaisoning with PSUs/Central/State Government Offices. 5 years in dealing with legal matters in Government of India/PSU/ Companies and similar entities. The minimum required qualification is LLB. Assistant Administrative Officer (International Relations): Graduate/Post-Graduate degree in any discipline (10+2+3+2) with at least 55% marks from a reputed & recognized University or Institute. Post-qualification relevant experience of at least 8 years for Graduates and 5 Years for Post-Graduate in Administration, out of which 3 years in independently handling International Relations functions. Assistant Student Counsellor: Master's degree in Clinical Psychology with a minimum of 55% marks or equivalent grade point average with relevant experience of five years after the qualifying degree, out of which two years should be in counseling at an academic/medical institution. OR Master's degree in psychology with a minimum of 55% marks or equivalent grade point average and a diploma in Mental and/or Social Psychology with relevant experience of five years after the diploma, out of which three years should be in counseling at an academic/medical institution. At least 2 years of experience in psychological counselling of young adults living in a fully residential campus of an academic institution of repute. Office Assistant: Bachelor's Degree (10+2+3) with minimum 55% marks or its equivalent grade and consistently good academic record and minimum 5 years of post-qualification relevant experience. Or Master's Degree (10+2+3+2) and minimum 55% marks or its equivalent grade and consistently good academic record and 3 years of post-qualification relevant experience in office work in a reputed organization/Govt. department. IT & Computer Assistant: BE (CS/IT)/ B.Tech. (CS/IT) or Electronics Engineering with specialization in Computers or MCA/ M.Sc. in Computer Science/IT. Minimum of 3 years of post-qualification experience in maintaining and supporting large scale networks, hardware, software, internet, e mail systems and related services. Junior Assistant: BBA/BCA or equivalent with 60% marks from reputed institutions and a minimum of 2-year experience in the relevant field. Expertise in Computers and ability to work in an automated environment is essential. Nursing Staff (Female): Graduate in Nursing or equivalent with 3 years of relevant experience in Govt./Semi Govt./ Central autonomous bodies/reputed hospitals. Administrative Executive: Section 8 Incubation Centre: Graduate (in any stream) from reputed UGC/AICTE recognised institution with minimum 60% (or equivalent) grade with good academic track record. Minimum 5 years of experience in administrative activities.

selection_process: Written Test and/or Skill Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Bodh Gaya Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Bodh Gaya to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by IIM Bodh Gaya?
faq.answer: IIM Bodh Gaya has released a total of 15 vacancies for various Non-Faculty Positions as part of its latest recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Bodh Gaya Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIM Bodh Gaya Non-Faculty Positions is 23rd June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IIM Bodh Gaya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIM Bodh Gaya Non-Faculty Positions is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from a Bachelor's Degree to Post-Graduate degrees, MBA, CA/M.Com, LLB, and specialized engineering degrees.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/NC-OBC/PWD/Ex-Servicemen categories as per the Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test and/or Skill Test followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary varies significantly by post, with the highest being Rs. 78,800 - 2,09,200 (Level 12) for Estate cum Project Officer and the lowest being Rs. 25,500 - 81,100 (Level 4) for Junior Assistant and Nursing Staff.
